testcase.name: testUniqueProperty

failure.message: Expected UNIQUE popup but got: Please Enter mandfield expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Expected UNIQUE popup but got: Please Enter mandfield expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at
